MOTION TO DISMISS
Off Calendar Jul-19-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
Atty. SVETLANA RISHINA, Esq. of Law Offices of Svetlana Rishina (Tel: 510-299-5346) for defendant Vita Bulava;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT VITA BULAVA'S MOTION TO DISMISS.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant's unopposed Motion to Dismiss under CCP section 425.16 is granted. Because plaintiff's entire complaint is based on the language at issue in this anti-SLAPP motion, the complaint is dismissed in its entirety (Baral v. Schnitt, 1 Cal.5th 376, 396). Defendant is entitled to recover $7810.85 in fees and costs. Any additional fees and costs incurred by defendant may be made in a separate motion.

Order signed.

Judge: Rochelle C. East; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RCE)
